last_digest.green_note: 9× 🟢 routine: Betconstruct cron job nodes (P4, root cause found — node DiskPressure — fix proposed, no partner impact), Pokerklas deposit-events gap (P1, partner still silent but FT keeps chasing, bot check-in nudge pending), Rewards GraphQL wemalaysia (self-cleared, Monday follow-up with Ryan Yu not yet actioned but day isn't over), Sub agent dashboard-admin issue (accepted into Investigating this morning, no partner impact), CVE-2021-45046 base-image fix (Patrik-deferred to next week, no change), Stanleybet Romania (fix deployed, awaiting partner verification), Calendars 12play door-variation (fix confirmed on 12MY by partner, rollout to TH/SG instances in progress), 12play/we88 fire-late fix (landed, monitoring, quiet), MrBit Production (new P3, lead self-assigned immediately, deposit-events investigation just starting).

synthesis.summary: New P3 IC Ticket: MrBit customer reports a missing €50.00 deposit for player 1073553 dated 16 Jul despite sending the payment event from their side. Lead self-assigned (Simon Brown) at open, Investigating since 10:17 UTC.
key_events: 20 Jul 10:17 UTC opened via Intercom, lead self-assigned (Simon Brown) same time
synthesis.why: No breach — metadata only, lead in place immediately, P3, ~20min old at run time; not yet deep-read (doesn't meet any Step 2 criterion).

synthesis.summary: P4: LLM MCP scheduled-job cron pods failed to spawn on Betconstruct cluster nodes over the weekend. Giancarlo flagged it to Agustín/Andrew this morning; Andrew root-caused it to node DiskPressure and proposed either recycling the nodes or applying Agustín's fix (increase disk to 40GB). No partner impact — internal AI-team tooling.

proposals: Recycle affected nodes, or apply Agustín's fix (increase node disk to 40GB) — proposed 09:28 CEST 20 Jul, not yet applied
synthesis.why: No breach — root cause found and a concrete fix proposed within ~1h20m of being flagged; P4, internal-only, no partner impact, still early (~4.5h old).

synthesis.summary: Cocobet (Mystake) blocked users appear to 'unblock' themselves because the partner's daily recon feed omits users who should stay blocked. Joachim sent the partner a clear technical ask on 17 Jul; the partner has been silent since. FT has applied progressively stronger mitigation (origin resync + blacklist, then stopping the recon service entirely) and made two fresh outreach attempts last cycle (Intercom + a direct DM from Ilke) — still no reply. Account-manager escalation still has not happened, now a 6th consecutive digest cycle flagging it.
